title: quercus tungmaiensis
intro: Quercus tungmaiensis, a species of oak tree native to China, is a deciduous tree belonging to the Fagaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus tungmaiensis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Quercus tungmaiensis may include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
